name: Peanut-Oatmeal Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together shortening, peanut butter, and sugars until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Blend in milk and vanilla extract.
4. Thoroughly stir flour, baking soda, and salt; add to the creamed mixture.
5. Stir in oats and chopped peanuts.
6. Drop batter from a teaspoon, about 2 inches apart, onto a greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 to 12 minutes.
Makes 6 dozen.
